full_text:
Bao Xin 鮑信
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bao Xin (鮑信)was born in Pingyang County, Taishan Prefecture (Presently Xintai in Shandon. Urged Yuan Shao to attack Dong Zhuo and invited Cao Cao to govern Yan. Bao Xin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Liu Dai, and the Wei Kingdom. Bao Xin lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
